matrix.break_glass_policy: Provider downgrade requires explicit runtime env override and auditable reason/ticket
matrix.rollback_path: Set CORTEXPILOT_PROVIDER to another allowed provider and rerun provider/runtime gates
matrix.failure_attribution_hint: Differentiate provider API contract failures from repo orchestration/runtime failures using the dedicated provider contract probe instead of PM chat orchestration evidence

matrix.break_glass_policy: Any host/image drift requires Dockerfile pin update plus supply-chain gate approval
matrix.rollback_path: Re-pin the last approved ci core image inputs and rerun docker_ci strict path
matrix.failure_attribution_hint: Distinguish Dockerfile / download-host drift from repo CI wrapper drift using supply-chain and docker_ci evidence

matrix.smoke_entrypoint: CORTEXPILOT_E2E_RUNNER=agents CORTEXPILOT_E2E_WEB_MODE=prod CORTEXPILOT_E2E_SKIP_FAST_GATE=1 CORTEXPILOT_E2E_CHECK_PM_STOP=0 CORTEXPILOT_E2E_ORCHESTRATION_SMOKE_MODE=1 CORTEXPILOT_E2E_API_PORT=18020 CORTEXPILOT_E2E_DASHBOARD_PORT=18120 bash scripts/e2e_pm_chat_command_tower_success.sh
matrix.break_glass_policy: Mock mode on CI requires explicit emergency override
matrix.rollback_path: Revert to the last passing PM chat real-E2E contract and rerun the real chain
matrix.failure_attribution_hint: Use PM chat real-E2E logs to separate provider failures, frontend flow failures, and orchestration/runtime failures

supported_versions_or_pins: Playwright runtime from ci core image
matrix.break_glass_policy: UI strict downgrade requires break-glass ticket
matrix.rollback_path: Revert to the last passing UI audit path and rerun ui_audit_gate
matrix.failure_attribution_hint: Separate browser/runtime dependency failures from product regressions using Lighthouse/Axe and Playwright evidence
